name: claudian
description: An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault
summaryZh: An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault 它主要面向代码场景，适合做 AI 编程助手、代码生成或自动修复。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做 AI Coding、代码审核、开发提效产品的团队。
